title: Close-Fit Armour
description: A resource pack to make armour fit more closely against the player model
body:
Exactly as the summary says - This resource pack makes armour fit more closely against the body. Made primarily to fix the hideous bulky looking armour on Wynncraft

![Off/On Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bae90d71755b5faa37d8c3ee21b205c7d50bdbc1.png)

(Picture taken on Wynncraft with the Wynncraft Minimal Armour resource pack enabled)
